name: 60" Modern Wooden Console Table with Drawer Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add practical style to your home with the 60-Inch Modern Wooden Console Table with Drawer from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Crafted from wood in a natural tone, this rectangular console table stands on four turned wood legs to add sophisticated style to the room. This console table comes with two built-in drawers and a lower shelf to provide ample space for your decorative accents, storage baskets and other items.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
